rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE JOHN SAPONE et al TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Petition Of Court-Appointed Counsel For Conservatee For Order Directing Sale Of Trust Real Property; Eviction If Necessary, And Rental Of Replacement Unit; Memo Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Demurrer sustained with 10 days leave to amend to substitute Alfred Cavagnaro as Petitioner in his capacity as co-trustee and/or Conservator of the Estate of Ebe Sapone. The Court grants the request for judicial notice of the 5/10/07 order appointing Mr. Cavagnaro as general conservator of Ebe Sapone, and the 11/5/10 order appointing Mr. Siracusa as counsel for Ebe Sapone. Any party requesting to argue the tentative must advise the court 415-551-3702 and opposing counsel no later than 5:00 pm on 11/15/11.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE WILLIS HANNA WALT TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Strike Portions Of Response And Objections To Petition For Reformation Of Trust To Correct Scrivener'S Error
rulings.Rulings: Linda Hannawalt's Motion to Strike Portions of Response and Objections to Petition for Reformation of Trust to Correct Scrivener's Errors is granted in part. The sentence beginning "When Beneficiaries raised . . " at page 2 line 4 through line 11 is stricken. Remainder of the Motion to Strike is denied. Any party requesting to argue the tentative shall notify the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel no later than 5:00 pm on 11/15/11.
